notes: Made guided setup the primary first-time Pathmark Online experience.
Changed setup navigation to a vertical step-by-step flow with Back, Next, Finish and Skip setup options.
Changed examples to non-committed placeholders inside setup forms rather than starter records loaded into the live sheet.
Removed setup from underneath the main Home dashboard and kept normal workspace navigation for returning users.
Kept setup progress in the user-owned Pathmark Sync Google Sheet and allowed users to revisit setup later without deleting data.
